title: JSON Object Formatter
scenario: Generate a JSON object with the following format: {"name": "John Doe", "age": 30, "city": "New York"}. Ensure the JSON object is properly formatted and easy to read.
constraints: Must be a single JSON object
Must use double quotes for key-value pairs

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON object meets all the constraints.
Verify if the JSON object is syntactically correct.
Evaluate if the JSON object is easy to read due to proper indentation and formatting.
